ddt:Target.Name: tachy VDO digital 1381 DIAGIS_14229
ddt:Target.Description:
Controlographe VDO 1381 1 DIN Digital pour Master/Mascott X70 X62
Responsable: Guillaume THOMAS I-DVU ALTEN Tél: 01 76 89 77 84
Version du 2 mars 2009
Fichier Diag pour face arrière Tachy

Item.Text: Disable I/O line is disable (default state)
Enable calibration I/O line as speedSignalInput
Enable calibration I/O line as realTimeSpeedSignalOutputSensor
Enable calibration I/O line as RTCOutput
Enable calibration I/O line as EngineRotationOutput
Disable I/O line is disable (default state)
Enable calibration I/O line as speedSignalInput
Enable calibration I/O line as realTimeSpeedSignalOutputSensor
Enable calibration I/O line as RTCOutput
Enable calibration I/O line as EngineRotationOutput
Handling errors with no other DTC
No ignition, but speed pulses present
CAN communication instrument <-> Recording Unit - no signal
Driving without card (Driver card or Workshop card)
No speed signal from sensor - no signal
Invalid speed signal or data link error - invalid signal
Speed sensor - Recording Unit: no data link signal - no signal

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Item.Text: Handling errors with no other DTC
No ignition, but speed pulses present
CAN communication instrument <-> Recording Unit - no signal
Driving without card (Driver card or Workshop card)
No speed signal from sensor - no signal
Invalid speed signal or data link error - invalid signal
Speed sensor - Recording Unit: no data link signal - no signal

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Request.Name: EcuReset
Request.Comment: This service is used for device reset and is allowed in programming session only. A reset will occur as soon as the VU is ready for reset.

Request.Name: SecurityAccess - requestSeed
Request.Comment: This service is used to forward a PIN in connection with inserting a workshop card.

Request.Name: SecurityAccess - sendKey
Request.Comment: This service is used to forward a PIN in connection with inserting a workshop card.

Request.Name: TesterPresent
Request.Comment: This service is used to indicate that the tester is still present keeping communication active. It will reset the P3 timer to prevent locking of the specific channel, which will require a new wake up. A response will be sent only if required.

Request.Name: DisableNormalMessageTransmission
Request.Comment: This service shall be used by a client to stop the normal (non diagnostic) message transmission from the VU.

Request.Name: EnableNormalMessageTransmission
Request.Comment: This service shall be used by a client to restart the normal (non diagnostic) message transmission from the VU after being disabled by the DisableNormalMessageTransmission service.

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession_ECU_programming_K_line
Request.Comment: This service is exclusively used to set the different diagnostic sessions under condition of calibration mode. There will be no disctinction between channels, all have equal rights via calibration interfaceI

Device.Name: CAN communication instrument <-> Recording Unit - no signal
Driving without card (Driver card or Workshop card)
Handling errors with no other DTC
Invalid speed signal or data link error - invalid signal
No ignition, but speed pulses present
No speed signal from sensor - no signal
Speed sensor - Recording Unit: no data link signal - no signal

Label.Text: Mémoire du programme, erreur de checksum
Mémoire de calibration, erreur de lecture/écriture
Unité d'enregistrement des pulsations de vitesse
Erreurs de traitement sans autres DTC
Pas de vitesse du capteur - pas de signal
Signal de vitesse invalide ou erreur de donnée - signal invalide
Capteur de vitesse ? unité d'enregistrement - pas de signal
Pas d'APC, mais pulsations de vitesse présentes
Instrument de communication CAN <=> unité d'enregistrement - pas de signal
Ex::: Request 1902FF Answer Composition 5902FD // 0005B2 /2C // 002280 /AC // 001260 /2C ====>3 octet pour DTC + 1 octet pour status
